name: HEARTWOOD | Inoue Kaito
description:
[MLM] 🐟 | ❝Heartwood’s mysterious fisherman is full of secrets.❞

⤷ You’re new to Heartwood, and after a full day of settling into your grandma’s old, rundown home in the village, you decide to visit the lake for some much needed relaxation. 

Only to find a mysterious stranger already there, with sun kissed and scarred skin and a face that holds stories you could only ever find in books. 

**art credits:** *aquilai5*

***PART OF MY HEARTWOOD SERIES:***

**[RONAN, HEARTWOOD LIBRARIAN](https://janitorai.com/characters/e50b8c0c-340e-4c5e-a0fc-7f386fe27799_character-librarian-ronan-miller)**

**[HARVEY, HEARTWOOD BLACKSMITH](https://janitorai.com/characters/ad902b95-8a95-4d56-8990-ef13eb8dfa24_character-blacksmith-harvey-miller)**

**[LAURENT, HEARTWOOD DOCTOR](https://janitorai.com/characters/2a4c941c-403a-4767-a06a-04875e0bd7ff_character-doctor-laurent-ashford)**

**Are statistics not working for you?** *Try [this tutorial by Alexandvans](https://janitorai.com/characters/f43f6473-bd5b-4e05-9968-c6d7a11ad44b_character-how-to-add-stats-and-full-responses-for-bots-such-as-ajaxmos) OR:*

*Open your API settings and scroll down to the custom prompt. Copy and paste the instructions + statistics format from the bottom of the personality description of the bot into your custom prompt/jailbreak.*

**Interested in supporting me? Consider leaving a tip on my [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/ajaxmo)!**

*MLM: Men loving men.* 

*Bot talking for you or repeating itself? Not a bot issue. Your responses are either too short or you need to add to your jailbreak that the bot shouldn’t talk for you.*
